glosses.vi: khán giả nữ; người xem nữ
glosses.ja: 女性観客; 女性視聴者

translations.en: I'm sitting next to the woman in the audience.
translations.es: Estoy sentado al lado de la espectadora.
translations.fr: Je suis assis à côté de la spectatrice.
translations.ko: 나는 여성 관객 옆에 앉아 있다.
translations.pt: Estou sentado ao lado da espectadora.
translations.vi: Tôi ngồi bên cạnh khán giả nữ.
translations.hi: मैं दर्शक के बगल में बैठा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg sitter ved siden av tilskueren.
translations.id: Aku duduk di sebelah penonton perempuan.
translations.da: Jeg sidder ved siden af tilskueren.
translations.ja: 観客の女性の隣に座っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; intransitive main predicate.
Preposition; two-way preposition that requires dative in a static-locative reading; introduces the PP.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Zuschauerin' as object of the preposition.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; complement (object) of the preposition 'neben'.

sentences.target: Die Zuschauerin klatscht laut nach dem Tor.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈtsuːʃaʊ̯əʁɪn klat͡ʃt laʊ̯t naːx deːm toːɐ̯/

translations.de: Die Zuschauerin klatscht laut nach dem Tor.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈtsuːʃaʊ̯əʁɪn klat͡ʃt laʊ̯t naːx deːm toːɐ̯/
translations.en: The spectator claps loudly after the goal.
translations.es: La espectadora aplaude fuerte después del gol.
translations.fr: La spectatrice applaudit fort après le but.
translations.it: La spettatrice applaude forte dopo il gol.
translations.ko: 그 여성 관객은 골이 들어간 뒤 크게 박수친다.
translations.zh-Hans: 进球后这位女观众大声鼓掌。
translations.yue: 入波之後嗰位女觀眾大聲拍手。
translations.pt: A espectadora bate palmas bem alto depois do gol.
translations.he: הצופה מוחאת כפיים בקול אחרי השער.
translations.tr: Golden sonra kadın seyirci yüksek sesle alkışlıyor.
translations.vi: Khán giả nữ vỗ tay to sau khi có bàn thắng.
translations.ar: تصفق المتفرجة بصوت عالٍ بعد الهدف.
translations.nl: De toeschouwster klapt hard na de goal.
translations.hu: A néző hangosan tapsol a gól után.
translations.hi: वह दर्शक गोल के बाद ज़ोर से तालियाँ बजाती है.
translations.el: Η θεάτρια χειροκροτεί δυνατά μετά το γκολ.
translations.id: Penonton perempuan itu bertepuk tangan keras setelah gol.
translations.ja: ゴールの後、観客の女性が大きく拍手する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; marks the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; intransitive main predicate.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'klatscht'.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces the temporal PP 'nach dem Tor' ('after the goal').
Definite article; neuter dative singular; agrees with 'Tor' as complement of 'nach'.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; complement (object) of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Er spricht kurz mit der Zuschauerin.

translations.de: Er spricht kurz mit der Zuschauerin.
translations.en: He talks briefly with the spectator.
translations.es: Él habla brevemente con la espectadora.
translations.fr: Il parle brièvement avec la spectatrice.
translations.it: Lui parla brevemente con la spettatrice.
translations.zh-Hans: 他和这位女观众简短地聊几句。
translations.yue: 佢同嗰位女觀眾傾幾句。
translations.pt: Ele fala rapidamente com a espectadora.
translations.vi: Anh ấy trò chuyện ngắn với khán giả nữ.
translations.nl: Hij praat kort met de toeschouwster.
translations.hi: वह दर्शक से थोड़ी देर बात करता है.
translations.el: Μιλάει για λίγο με τη θεάτρια.
translations.id: Dia berbicara sebentar dengan penonton perempuan itu.
translations.ro: El vorbește pe scurt cu spectatoarea.
translations.ja: 彼は観客の女性と少し話す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate selecting a PP ('mit ...').
Adverb of manner; modifies 'spricht'.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces the PP 'mit der Zuschauerin'.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Zuschauerin' as complement of 'mit'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; complement (object) of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Ich erkenne die Zuschauerin von gestern.

translations.de: Ich erkenne die Zuschauerin von gestern.
translations.en: I recognize the spectator from yesterday.
translations.es: Reconozco a la espectadora de ayer.
translations.ko: 나는 어제 봤던 여성 관객을 알아본다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认出昨天的那位女观众。
translations.yue: 我認得昨日嗰位女觀眾。
translations.pt: Eu reconheço a espectadora de ontem.
translations.vi: Tôi nhận ra khán giả nữ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Ik herken de toeschouwster van gisteren.
translations.hi: मैं कल वाली दर्शक को पहचानता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner igjen tilskueren fra i går.
translations.id: Aku mengenali penonton perempuan dari kemarin.
translations.sv: Jag känner igen åskådaren från igår.
translations.ro: O recunosc pe spectatoarea de ieri.
translations.da: Jeg genkender tilskueren fra i går.
translations.ja: 昨日の観客の女性に見覚えがある。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present indicative; transitive verb taking an accusative object.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'erkenne'.
Preposition; introduces the PP 'von gestern' functioning as a postnominal temporal modifier.
Temporal adverb; within the PP 'von gestern' specifying time; postmodifies 'Zuschauerin'.
